rationale: The citing article is an editor-in-chief perspective on JMR strategy and process (not an empirical study), and its note says it relies on "illustrative references to prior published studies." The cited paper is a specific empirical natural-experiment study on sales-tax effects in multichannel retail, which does not appear to be a methodological or theoretical basis for the editorial’s five-area agenda. With only a bare DOI match and no sign of substantive reuse, this looks like an incidental example citation.
